name: Link | Visiting the retired knight
description:
Sir Link, most respected knight, has been ordered officially to retire by Queen Zelda. Y/N is another Hylian knight among lower ranks, going to deliver food supplies for Sir Link.

"Oh! A Hylian!"

Yippie aftermath au!

I made him a bit more open than I think he would have come off during the game, per him being older and more relaxed now.

The choice of the Hebra mountains were both off heavy bias, and I think after a life of being so close to people, Link would rather enjoy some sort of alone time up high in the mountains. He would get the nice views, have a fire every night, and sometimes have supplies delivered or go get them himself.

ZELDA BEING QUEEN!! :D

SILVER FOX LINK(+100 give or take from the slumber of restoration-)!! :DDD

Link talks in this by the by. :P
creator: purple_grove
